name: create-mr
description: Generates a local Merge Request description file (MR-<branch>.md) at the project root with title and description. No push, no GitLab API calls.

interface.shortDescription: Generate MR title and description as a local Markdown file
interface.longDescription: Analyzes commits and diff between the current branch and a target branch (default: develop), generates a structured MR description with sections: O que foi feito, Arquivos alterados, Motivação, Como testar. Saves the result as MR-<branch-name>.md in the project root. No push, no GitLab integration.
